V-M-FOUNDATION-SETTINGS.evidence: Settings frozen, env-prefix AISW_, defaults for log_level/workspace/db URLs.

V-M-FOUNDATION-LOGGING.evidence: structlog JSON renderer, ISO UTC timestamps, correlation_id contextvar bound/reset.

V-M-AUTH-USERS.evidence: users.toml parsed/validated; allowlist atomic swap; SIGHUP+watchdog 500ms debounce; sha256 short-circuit.

V-M-STORAGE.evidence: WAL, synchronous=NORMAL, foreign_keys=ON, busy_timeout=5000 applied per connection.

V-M-STORAGE-JOBS.evidence: jobs/tracker_answers/jobs_dlq schema via alembic baseline; JobPayload discriminated union round-trips (parse_job_payload); PRAGMAs verified on engine. aisw-269 (Phase-D.b.2b): DigestPayload.wiki_scope widened Literal['all'] → 'all' | list[str] (non-empty list) — DigestPayload(wiki_scope='all') and DigestPayload(wiki_scope=['health']) both validate; wiki_scope=[] rejected; model_dump(mode='json') ↔ parse_job_payload round-trips the list shape; an existing {'kind':'digest','wiki_scope':'all',...} dict still validates (no jobs.db migration; wiki_scope is not the union discriminator). VERSION 0.0.4 → 0.0.5.

V-M-STORAGE-AUDIT.evidence: 10 tables present per D-006 amendment (alembic baseline); PRAGMAs verified; append-only invariants.

commands.cmd: uv run pytest tests/unit/test_runtime_wiring.py tests/unit/test_router_adapter.py tests/unit/test_librarian_adapter.py tests/unit/test_main_hint_catalog.py -q
uv run python -m ai_steward_wiki # manual smoke with AISW_TG_BOT_TOKEN_LOCAL

V-M-RUNTIME-WIRING.evidence: Unit tests cover sync-URL derivation, data-dir creation, users.toml load fallbacks, signal handler wiring, _amain composition with mocks, missing-token fail-fast, main → asyncio.run. aisw-5sd: make_hint_catalog_resolver — telegram_id → {wiki_stem: hint_text} via surrogate_id_of + owner_wikis_resolver + get_or_refresh_hint per domain CLAUDE.md; unknown sender (surrogate None) → {} (fast-path falls through); a domain with no '## Inbox hint' → omitted; no domain WIKIs → {} without touching the cache (get_or_refresh_hint monkeypatched in the unit). aisw-hcl: VoiceHandler/PhotoIngestor wired into DefaultPipeline; media _staging sweep job registered; _WikiRunnerAdapter.run promotes staged media into <wiki>/raw/media after a successful run. aisw-dsg: _RouterAdapter — ensure_inbox_wiki, _render_raw_sidecar, run_wiki_session in Inbox-WIKI/ with prompts/inbox.md, parse_router_reply, WikiRunnerError→RouterError, inbox.router.* markers. aisw-zd9: _LibrarianAdapter — resolve_target_wiki (create new dir; ROUTE-missing → create + warning; cap → rejected; bad name → rejected), stage_raw_into_wiki (raw/<ts>_text.md + promote media), run_wiki_session with wiki_id=f"{tid}/<Name>" + overlay=domain-default.md + timeout_s=None, IngestOutcome(ok|run_failed|rejected), WikiRunnerError→run_failed keeps the raw, inbox.route.* markers via capsys. Manual smoke: `python -m ai_steward_wiki` starts, logs runtime.media_pipeline.wired + polling.start, Ctrl-C → shutdown.done, exit 0.

commands.cmd: uv run pytest tests/unit/tg/test_handlers.py tests/unit/tg/test_commands.py tests/unit/tg/test_pipeline.py tests/unit/tg/test_pipeline_document.py -q

V-M-TG-HANDLERS-WIRING.evidence: Unit tests cover callback parsing (8 variants), router/dispatcher wiring (7 message handlers: text/voice/photo/audio/video_note/document/callback), _download_bytes, text/voice/photo/audio/video_note/document/confirm dispatch with fake aiogram Message+CallbackQuery, L1 dedup short-circuit, photo→runner(media_paths)→deliver, photo+caption, photo L2 dedup, image-document routed, STT-unavailable graceful path, fallback acks when voice/photo handlers absent. aisw-hcl (media handling): F.audio + F.video_note route to on_voice; photo handler forwards message.caption; on_photo runs Claude vision via the wiki pipeline. aisw-269 (Phase-D.b.2b — the bot's first slash commands): a dedicated Command('digest_now')/Command('expand') router registered BEFORE the F.text catch-all — a non-command text message still reaches MessagePipeline.on_text unchanged (router-order regression test). /digest_now: select the calling owner's jobs.Job rows kind=='digest_job' status=='scheduled' → for each call scheduler.firing.fire_digest_job(job_id); 0 rows → ru "no digest configured" hint (tg.command.digest_now.empty); a per-job exception is caught and logged (tg.command.digest_now.job_failed) so the remaining jobs still run; tg.command.digest_now.done with n_jobs. /expand <section>: arg ∈ {today, meds, trackers, wiki} else ru usage line (tg.command.expand.bad_section); resolve the owner WIKI set (Inbox excluded) — empty → ru notice; else digest_runner(wiki_id=primary, …, section=<key>) → reply via send_message (no run_outputs row); empty model text → ru "nothing for this section" line; tg.command.expand.delivered with section/chars; any exception at the handler boundary → generic ru error + tg.command.expand.failed. Both handlers wrap their body in try/except so nothing bubbles to the aiogram dispatcher.

V-M-TG-PIPELINE-CLASSIFIER.evidence: Unit tests cover text happy path, L1 dup short-circuit, L2 dedup hit, classifier error → ACK_CLASSIFY_ERR_RU, runner error → ACK_RUNNER_ERR_RU, empty runner output → ACK_TEXT_RU via deliver, back-compat None injection, voice happy/empty/back-compat, structlog markers via capsys; aggregate_text across stream-json payload shapes. aisw-dsg: routable intents with a wired Router go through router.route(); router=None / non-routable use the legacy path; RouterError → ACK_RUNNER_ERR_RU; tg.pipeline.router.* markers. aisw-zd9: the ROUTE/CREATE_WIKI librarian.ingest() path (now reached via the confirm callback). aisw-e45 (Phase-C): a ROUTE/CREATE_WIKI decision (wired librarian + output) → no immediate ingest; ConfirmationService.request_explicit called with category="route_ingest" + build_route_confirm_keyboard + a draft round-trippable via route_action_from_payload; recap mentions target + notes; CLARIFY/REJECT and librarian=None → send_message(decision.notes), no confirm row. on_confirm_callback: route_ingest row + resolve→"confirmed" → ROUTE_CONFIRM_ACK_RU then librarian.ingest() with the reconstructed decision + media Paths → status="ok" → output.deliver(reply) else send_message(reply); resolve→"cancelled" → ROUTE_CONFIRM_CANCELLED_RU, no ingest; resolve→None → ROUTE_CONFIRM_STALE_RU, no ingest; non-route_ingest or missing row → legacy resolve path (tg.pipeline.confirm); tg.pipeline.route.confirm_* + confirm.route_dispatched markers via capsys. Integration (RUN_INTEGRATION=1): test_e2e_pipeline.py scenario 6 — routable text → recap + route_ingest pending row (no domain WIKI yet) → on_confirm_callback("confirm") → real Stage-1b librarian writes into the target <Domain>-WIKI/raw/, ROUTE_CONFIRM_ACK_RU sent, reply via output.deliver; tolerant of CLARIFY/REJECT. aisw-269 (Phase-D.b.2b — named-subset WIKI in the digest fast-path): after parse_recurrence, _extract_wiki_names(turn_text, owner_wiki_stems) — whole-token, case-insensitive intersection with the owner's *-WIKI/ dir-stems; all mentioned names resolve → list[str], none mentioned → 'all', a name-shaped token that does not resolve → return None → ru clarification (lists the owner's WIKI names), NO confirm draft built, NO job created (tg.pipeline.digest.wiki_unknown); the category='digest' confirm draft carries wiki_scope (the new shape) and the recap/ack names the chosen WIKIs when scoped; on confirm → create_digest_job(... wiki_scope=...). Unit: «сводка по Health каждый день в 9» with the owner having Health-WIKI/ → draft.wiki_scope==['Health'], recap names it; «сводка по Money …» with no Money-WIKI/ → clarification, no draft; no names mentioned → wiki_scope=='all' (today's behaviour). aisw-5sd (Phase-E.b — '## Inbox hint' router-bypass): a new pre-router block (between the reminder fast-path and the routable branch) guarded on intent ∈ _ROUTABLE_INTENTS ∧ router ∧ hint_catalog_resolver ∧ librarian ∧ output — builds the sender's hint catalog (hint_catalog_resolver), score_catalog(text, catalog); on is_confident → RouterDecision(intent=ROUTE, target_wiki=<stem>, raw="", parsed_ok=True) → route_action_to_payload → PendingConfirmDraft(category="route_ingest", recap=build_route_recap) → ConfirmationService.request_explicit(build_route_confirm_keyboard) → return, WITHOUT awaiting router.route; not confident → tg.pipeline.hint_fastpath.miss(reason=ambiguous if top_score≥MIN_SCORE else no_match) + fallthrough → heavy router runs; empty catalog → miss(reason=empty_catalog) + fallthrough, scorer not consulted; hint_catalog_resolver=None or librarian=None ⇒ block skipped, heavy router runs. Unit (test_pipeline_hint_fastpath.py, capsys for markers): confident hit bypasses router and requests a route_ingest confirm whose recap names the target; ambiguous/no_match/empty/disabled all fall through to router.route; hint_fastpath.{catalog,hit,miss,fallthrough} markers asserted on their paths. Never routes silently — the user still confirms via the same route-confirm keyboard.

V-M-TG-PIPELINE-STREAMING.evidence: 7 unit tests cover fast path (no placeholder, single deliver), slow path (placeholder + buffered+live feeds + final aggregate), runner exception (finalize editor + ACK_RUNNER_ERR_RU via sender), back-compat None injection, aggregate_text-as-truth, outcome.text fallback, empty-outcome ACK_TEXT_RU fallback. 3 unit tests cover run_wiki_session on_event callback (per-event delivery, exception swallow+log, no-callback back-compat). Full suite 385/385 green; make lint and grace lint clean.

V-M-CLAUDE-CLI-COMMON.evidence: resolve_binary (/-path short-circuit + shutil.which), build_env (CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR + minimal PATH only), neutral_cwd (no project CLAUDE.md auto-discovery), system_prompt_argv (inlines prompt file content), truncate_stderr (UTF-8 decode + length cap).

commands.cmd: uv run pytest tests/unit/auth/test_onboarding.py tests/unit/auth/test_admin.py tests/unit/auth/test_lint_onboarding.py -q

V-M-ONBOARD-ADMIN.evidence: pending_users idempotent upsert + TTL purge; intro template slug validation (REQUIRED_SLUGS, lint_onboarding); AdminService approve/reject/elevate/demote with admin gating (NotAnAdmin) + admin_events trail (D-028); ShadowEmitter default LoggingShadowEmitter.

V-M-SCHEDULER.evidence: build_scheduler (AsyncIOScheduler + SQLAlchemyJobStore, D-003); PriorityJobQueue 5 lanes FIFO tiebreak; WikiLockManager 3-tier acquire/release + stale-PID recovery; classify_exception taxonomy + FailureCounter 3-strikes auto-disable (D-019); move_to_dlq writes jobs_dlq; kill_with_sequence SIGTERM→grace→SIGKILL (D-021); register_all_retention_jobs wires purge-pending + media _staging sweep + retention.

commands.cmd: uv run pytest tests/unit/scheduler/test_firing.py tests/unit/tg/test_pipeline_reminder.py tests/unit/tg/test_pipeline_digest.py tests/unit/tg/test_digest_e2e.py -q

V-M-SCHEDULER-FIRING.evidence: Pipeline reminder fast-path (BEFORE the Stage-1a router): intent==REMINDER & confidence≥THRESHOLD + future time → ConfirmationService.request_explicit with category='reminder' draft (when_utc, message, lead_time_min) + 2-button keyboard, no Job row yet; message resolution = distilled_payload['reminder_text'] if non-empty str else raw text; prefer_future=True rolls a bare past wall-clock time forward; explicitly-past absolute date → ru rejection, no confirm; escalate → ru clarification, no confirm; recurring-digest phrasing → ru "not yet", no confirm. on_confirm_callback category=='reminder' + resolve→'confirmed' → create_reminder_job writes a jobs.Job(kind='reminder_job', payload round-trips through parse_job_payload, scheduled_at_utc==when_utc) + scheduler.add_job once with a DateTrigger at when_utc, id=='reminder:<id>', misfire_grace_time is None; ack sent. cancel→ru cancelled, no Job row; resolve→None→ru stale; double-confirm idempotent. firing.fire_job: context set + Job pending → sender.send_message(chat_id, '🔔 Напоминание: <message>') + row done; Job not pending → skipped, no send; send raises → row failed + last_error + scheduler.reminder.deliver_failed; context not set → RuntimeError. ReminderPayload in parse_job_payload: valid → ReminderPayload, extra key → ValidationError. Integration: reminder message → request_explicit → simulate confirm → jobs.jobs row with kind='reminder_job' & matching scheduled_at_utc → invoke fire_job(job_id) with a fake sender → one send_message + row done. Known limitation (documented, no MVP reconciliation): a crash between the Job commit and scheduler.add_job leaves a pending row with no trigger → silent miss. (aisw-kcz; D-002/D-010/D-022; tech-spec §3/§6; ADR-006.) Digest path (aisw-oqq, Phase-D.b.1): pipeline digest fast-path (replaces the reminder branch's recurring-keyword stub): recurring-digest phrasing → parse_recurrence; on escalate → ru clarification, no confirm; else → ConfirmationService.request_explicit with category='digest' draft (recurrence serialised, wiki_scope='all', window_hours=24) + 2-button keyboard, no Job row yet. on_confirm_callback category=='digest' + resolve→'confirmed' → create_digest_job writes a jobs.Job(kind='digest_job', status='scheduled', priority==Lane.DIGEST, payload round-trips through parse_job_payload) + scheduler.add_job once with a CronTrigger (kwargs == recurrence.to_cron(), timezone == recurrence.tz), id=='digest:<id>', replace_existing=True; ack sent. cancel→ru cancelled, no Job row; resolve→None→ru stale; double-confirm idempotent. firing.fire_digest_job: context set + Job 'scheduled' → resolve owner WIKI set (minus Inbox-WIKI) → run_wiki_session called once with extra_add_dirs == the non-primary WIKI paths, under the Semaphore + WikiLockManager(primary), timeout_s==600 → assistant text (or the ru empty-digest line) delivered via tg/output (send_message or send_document); row stays status='scheduled', retry_count==0, finished_at_utc set. Job not 'scheduled' → skipped, no run. Owner has no *-WIKI → friendly ru line, finished, no strike. run_wiki_session raises (WikiRunnerError / WikiRunnerTimeoutError) → retry_count++; third consecutive failure → status='disabled' + scheduler.remove_job('digest:<id>') called + jobs_dlq row written; scheduler.digest.failed logged with error_class/retry_count/disabled. Bad/parse-failing payload → status='disabled' + DLQ immediately. context not set → DigestNotInitialisedError. DigestPayload in parse_job_payload: valid (with a Recurrence) → DigestPayload, extra key → ValidationError. run_wiki_session: extra_add_dirs paths appear in argv immediately after the primary '--add-dir <wiki_path>'; None → unchanged argv. e2e (in-process slow unit, mirrors the reminder e2e): recurring-digest text → request_explicit → simulate confirm → jobs.jobs row kind='digest_job' status='scheduled' + add_job with a CronTrigger → set_digest_context + fire_digest_job(job_id) with a fake runner-adapter (canned assistant events) → one delivery through tg/output → row still 'scheduled', retry_count==0. (aisw-oqq; D-002/D-019/D-024/D-025; tech-spec §3; ADR-007.) Digest interactive (aisw-269, Phase-D.b.2b): DigestRunner Protocol gains section:str|None=None — fire_digest_job still calls runner(...) with the default (full digest), byte-identical. fire_digest_job after resolving the owner WIKI set, when payload.wiki_scope is a list[str]: keep only (wid, path) whose wid (case-insensitive) ∈ the list → run_wiki_session gets the filtered set; scheduler.digest.scope_filter logged requested/kept/vanished; empty kept list → ru "all scoped WIKIs vanished" notice via send_message, finished_at_utc set, status stays 'scheduled' (NO strike — config drift, not a run failure), scheduler.digest.delivered logged empty='scope_vanished'. payload.wiki_scope=='all' → unchanged. create_digest_job accepts wiki_scope:str|list[str] and persists DigestPayload(wiki_scope=…); scheduler.digest.scheduled carries wiki_scope. Unit: fire_digest_job with wiki_scope=['health'] runs only that WIKI; vanished name → ru notice, no strike, status 'scheduled', scope_filter marker; create_digest_job(wiki_scope=['health','money']) persists a list shape round-trippable via parse_job_payload. (aisw-269; D-024; ADR-025.)

V-M-CLASSIFIER-STAGE0.evidence: classify orchestrates backend call + Pydantic validation + audit prompt_versions upsert + structlog; PromptCache semver+sha256 with reload(); Intent closed enum (D-009); parse_time dateparser→Haiku-fallback→escalate (D-010); ClaudeCliBackend resolves binary + JSON-mode envelope; AnthropicApiBackend optional; FakeClaudeRunner deterministic; INV-6 settings guard; ClassifierTimeoutError/SchemaError taxonomy.

V-M-CLASSIFIER-RECURRENCE.evidence: parse_recurrence over a ru corpus: «каждый день в 9 (утра)» → Recurrence(kind='daily', time_hhmm='09:00', tz=user_tz); «по будням в 19:00» → kind='weekly', weekdays==(mon..fri), time_hhmm='19:00'; «еженедельно по понедельникам и пятницам в 8» → weekly, weekdays==(mon,fri), '08:00'; ambiguous / no time-of-day / monthly / interval / raw-cron-string → RecurrenceParseResult(recurrence=None, escalate=True, reason set); optional Haiku fallback path returns a parsed Recurrence when the rule-based regex misses and a backend+prompt are wired, else escalate. Recurrence.to_cron(): daily → {'hour': HH, 'minute': MM}; weekly → {'day_of_week': comma-joined 3-letter names in calendar order, 'hour': HH, 'minute': MM}; round-trips through model_dump(mode='json') (frozen, extra forbidden). tz defaults to Settings.default_user_tz when the caller passes none. (aisw-oqq; D-002; tech-spec §3.)

commands.cmd: uv run pytest tests/unit/wiki/test_runner.py tests/unit/wiki/test_runner_aggregate.py tests/unit/wiki/test_runner_on_event.py tests/unit/wiki/test_streaming.py tests/unit/wiki/test_acquire.py -q

V-M-WIKI-RUNNER.evidence: run_wiki_session: assemble_prompt (base+overlay+per-WIKI CLAUDE.md atomic write), WikiLockAdapter acquire, spawn `claude --output-format stream-json`, parse_stream_json events, hard timeout + kill-sequence (WikiRunnerTimeoutError), on_event callback (per-event delivery, exception swallow); aggregate_text across stream-json shapes; classify_line pure mapping; AsyncioSpawner default.

V-M-WIKI-LIFECYCLE.evidence: normalize_wiki_name Cyrillic→Latin ISO 9 + PascalCase + slug (D-008); WikiLifecycleManager owner-scoped create/lookup/list/soft_delete/restore with AntiSpamCapError + NearDuplicateMatch (Levenshtein ≤2) + TrashRetentionExpiredError (D-041); parse/render_frontmatter + managed/user-zone markers + load_template sha256 (D-039); preflight 5-step grounding → PreflightReport.

commands.cmd: uv run pytest tests/unit/inbox/test_materialize.py tests/unit/inbox/test_parser.py tests/unit/inbox/test_hint_cache.py tests/unit/inbox/test_hint_match.py tests/unit/inbox/test_staging.py -q

V-M-INBOX.evidence: inbox_wiki_path pure <wiki_root>/<telegram_id>/Inbox-WIKI (per-user media-staging root, D-022; aisw-12t); ensure_inbox_wiki idempotent first-contact materialise (D-004); extract_inbox_hint parses "## Inbox hint" body or None (D-016); InboxHintCacheRepo UPSERT/get/invalidate + get_or_refresh_hint stat→cache-hit on (size,mtime) else read+sha256; score_catalog token-overlap count (message ∩ each domain's hint+stem-name tokens, normalised: casefold word-runs, drop <3-char + stop-words) → ranked HintMatch; is_confident iff one domain has ≥MIN_SCORE(2) matched keywords AND ≥MIN_MARGIN(1) lead over #2 — single clear winner / ambiguous (gap too small) / weak winner / empty catalog / stem-name folding / token normalisation / threshold boundaries unit-covered (aisw-5sd); stage_media atomic write to _staging/<run_id>_<sha8>.<ext>; promote_to_raw / promote_path_to_raw atomic move to raw/media/<ISO8601>_<sha8>.<ext>; sweep_staging TTL delete (one inbox_root) + sweep_all_user_staging over every per-user Inbox-WIKI (D-022).

V-M-INBOX-ROUTER.evidence: parse_router_reply: happy path for each RouterIntent (route/create_wiki/clarify/reject), multi-line notes, target_wiki null/empty → None, preamble + quoted example → last ```router block wins, missing block → RouterDecision(intent=CLARIFY, parsed_ok=False, notes=trimmed-original-or-generic), unknown intent value → fallback, ROUTE/CREATE_WIKI without target → demoted to CLARIFY, RouterDecision frozen + extra=forbid, RouterError is an Exception (aisw-dsg; prompts/inbox.md ≥1.1.0).

V-M-INBOX-ROUTE.evidence: resolve_target_wiki: CREATE_WIKI → new dir, created=True; idempotent second call → created=False; ROUTE existing → created=False; ROUTE missing → create + on_route_missing callback; AntiSpamCapError → RouteRejection("cap"); WikiNameError → RouteRejection("bad_name"). stage_raw_into_wiki: text → raw/<ts>_text.md body verbatim, media_rel=[]; voice/photo → .md sidecar with YAML front-matter + promote_path_to_raw into raw/media/ (StagedRaw.media_abs absolute & exists, source moved); already-gone media → skipped. pick_domain_overlay: domain-<slug>.md if present else domain-default.md. build_ingest_prompt references the raw path(s) + the user text (aisw-zd9; D-004). aisw-e45 (Phase-C): route_action_to_payload ∘ route_action_from_payload is identity for ROUTE and CREATE_WIKI decisions with/without media (RouterIntent/RouterDecision/Path reconstructed by type; missing media → []); from_payload raises ValueError on a missing 'decision' or a bad 'source'.

V-M-INGEST-IDEM.evidence: IdempotencyService.check_update_id (L1 tg_updates, 24h TTL), check_content (L2 seen_files, SHA-256, 30d TTL), record_dedup_choice (dedup_hits); normalize_text NFKC+strip+lower+collapse-ws for text hashing; compute_content_hash per ContentKind; SeenFileMatch on collision (D-018 amended 2026-05-10, INV-4).

V-M-OPS-PII.evidence: PIIRedactor tiered redaction (NIST SP 800-122) with HMAC secret + on/off toggles + make_structlog_processor; module-level redact convenience; purge_user GDPR endpoint admin-gated + allow-listed stores (D-034 §10.4); RETENTION_POLICIES matrix; run_purge with dry_run + cutoff_utc/oldest_kept_utc; register_retention_jobs adds §10.4 cron; purge_trash_sweep tier-1/tier-2 final sweep; purge_staging wraps inbox.staging.sweep_staging.

V-M-OPS-BACKUP.evidence: snapshot_databases VACUUM INTO state/snapshots/<UTC>/ for jobs/audit/sessions (0700 dirs); purge_old_snapshots 7d rolling retention; register_db_snapshot_job cron 03:00 UTC (D-037, INV-2/INV-3); restore test reloads a snapshot; init_wiki_git idempotent git init + .gitignore; format_commit_message "<job_id>(<category>): <title>"; auto_commit stage-all + commit, no-op when nothing staged; WikiGitError on CLI failure.

commands.cmd: uv run pytest tests/unit/tg/test_bot.py tests/unit/tg/test_middleware_auth.py tests/unit/tg/test_middleware_start_bypass.py tests/unit/tg/test_confirm.py tests/unit/tg/test_output.py tests/unit/tg/test_stream_edit.py -q

V-M-TG-TEXT.evidence: build_bot (HTML parse_mode) + build_dispatcher (AllowlistMiddleware outer); AllowlistMiddleware denies unknown telegram_id with DENY_TEXT_RU + auth.deny, /start bypass, carries user_record (D-031, D-042); ConfirmationService auto/implicit/explicit + 10min TTL + compute_payload_hash + 3-button keyboard (D-023); request_explicit accepts a keyboard_factory (default 3-button; build_route_confirm_keyboard → 2-button confirm/cancel for Inbox-WIKI route confirms, aisw-e45); deliver_output ≤3500 inline / ≤10000 ChainSplitter (i/M footer, ≤3 parts) / >10000 HaikuSummarizer→LengthCapSummarizer + RunOutput persistence (D-024, D-025); HtmlBalancer tag balancing; StreamEditor 1.5s/Δ≥50 throttle + chain-split at 4000 + final-flush on end/exception/cancel (D-026).

V-M-TG-VOICE.evidence: FasterWhisperTranscriber lazy CTranslate2 int8 CPU model, ru/en, RTF target ≤0.5, fallback lang ru, raises VoiceUnavailableError on missing faster-whisper; VoiceHandler stages bytes via inbox.staging.stage_media then transcribes → (MediaRef, Transcript) (D-022); audio + video_note route here from handlers.

V-M-TG-PHOTO.evidence: PhotoIngestor stages photo bytes to _staging/ via inbox.staging.stage_media → MediaRef; PHOTO_MIME_TO_EXT closed mapping of allowed photo MIME types; photos (and image-documents) run Claude vision via the wiki pipeline media_paths (D-022, tech-spec §9).
